return(function(u,a,R,x,Q,n,V,H,e,t,D,g,J,E,p,q,I,G,v,W,Y)t,G,D,I,g,e,H,W,v,J,p,q,E,Y=function(u)I[u]=I[u]-(-195250-(-195251))if I[u]==486025-486025 then I[u],D[u]=nil,nil end R=function(...)return v(u,{...},c,a)end return R end,function(u,c)local a=q(c)local R=function(R,x,Q,n,V,D)return v(u,{R,x;Q;n,V;D},c,a)end return R end,function(v,R,x,Q)local gr={}local end,function(u,c)local a=q(c)local R=function(R,x,Q,n,V)return v(u,{R;x;Q;n,V},c,a)end return R end,function(u)for c=-197513-(-197514),#u,333891+-333890 do I[u[c]]=I[u[c]]+(-751519+751520)end if R then local v=R(true)local a=Q(v)a[c(155398+-140313)],a[c(-968384+983419)],a[c(573873-558631)]=u,E,function()return-3956588-(-831359)end return v else return x({},{[c(-776521+791556)]=E;[c(-313634+328719)]=u;[c(-292757-(-307999))]=function()return-712312+-2412917 end})end end,function(u)local c,v=-460784+460785,u[633600+-633599]while v do I[v],c=I[v]-(65664+-65663),(99563-99562)+c if I[v]==466299-466299 then I[v],D[v]=nil,nil end v=u[c]end end,function(u,c)local a=q(c)local R=function(R,x,Q)return v(u,{R;x,Q},c,a)end return R end return(H(4855831-296732,{}))(a(V))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[c(-928047-(-943217))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
